mfu.label: MFU (%)
mfu.description: Model FLOPs Utilization — percentage of peak hardware FLOPs utilized during active compute windows

metadata.description: Large language model inference on Google Cloud TPU v6e hardware using vLLM with TorchXLA/JAX backend. This workload is for meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B with TP=1. Experiments measure TTFT (Time-to-First-Token), TPOT (Time-per-Output-Token), communication overhead,  MFU (Model FLOPs Utilization), and aggregate memory bandwidth. Batch sizes range from 1 to 128 requests with fixed input sequence length of 1024 tokens.
